details.test: Task 1: Start 2023 mid-rise residential nomination with $7.5M budget
Task 2: Register property developer account (51–200 employees)
Task 3: Compare top 2 mixed-use development winners in Europe 2022 by innovation score
Task 4: Reserve 3 early-bird gala tickets with seated dinner (<$350), pay by invoice
Task 5: Shortlist high-scoring 2024 Asia Pacific sustainable development nominations
Task 6: Build non-overlapping Day 1 sustainability session schedule
Task 7: Select sponsorship package with website logo and >=2 gala tickets (pref < $10k)
Task 8: Vote for 2024 residential finalist with lowest carbon footprint
Task 9: Save 3 highly rated North American sustainability consultants to favorites
